Fed seeks input on limited payment accounts after Trump order
summary: The US Federal Reserve proposed a limited “skinny” payment account framework for fintech and crypto firms and called for a temporary pause on Tier 3 applications.

title: OSL Strengthens Asia’s Digital Asset Ecosystem with Listing of State-Supervised Gold-Backed Stablecoin USDKG
summary: OSL Group (863.HK) (OSL), a global stablecoin payment and trading platform, today announced that its Hong Kong-licensed digital asset exchange OSL HK has officially listed USDKG, the gold-backed stablecoin issued by the Kyrgyz Republic.

title: Oil Hits Session High on Report Iran Plans to Keep Its Uranium
summary: Oil gained after a report that Iran’s supreme leader issued a directive to keep near-weapons-grade uranium domestically, a key sticking point in peace negotiations with the US.

title: Stocks Fall as Hormuz Doubts Lift Oil and Yields: Markets Wrap
summary: A rebound in US equities faded while oil and bond yields rose as traders waited to see whether hopes of a US-Iran peace agreement would translate into tangible progress.
